messages.content: A truck driver goes the wrong way on a one way street. Two police cars see him but don't stop him. Why is that?

The police cars may not have seen the truck driver going the wrong way on a one way street because they were not in the right place at the right time, or because they were distracted by another event. It may also be that the police cars were not in a position to stop the truck driver, or that they were not equipped with the necessary tools to do so safely.
That is not the answer. There is a hidden assumption in the question. Try again.

Yes, I see that you are correct. The question assumes only that the police cars were in the right place at the right time to see the truck driver going the wrong way on a one-way street. However, this is not always the case, and there may be other factors that contributed to the police cars not stopping the truck driver.
The reason is that the driver was walking and not driving. Do you understand now?

Yes, I understand now. This is a valid explanation for why the police cars did not stop the truck driver. In addition to this, the driver may have been in a hurry and did not notice the one-way street.
